current_position: Paused after architecture review of workflow intent analysis, source scouting, and retrieval. Current work is an architectural/refactor decision stream inside Phase 2, not a numbered 02-xx plan task.

completed_tasks.name: Updated Intent Analyst prompt to mention Rosstat/FedStat, World Bank, and NSED/CKAN and to fill source_preferences only from explicit user source hints.
completed_tasks.verification: Targeted source-preference prompt test passed in the earlier session.

completed_tasks.name: Moved runtime defaults away from .planning paths by adding app.workflow.runtime_paths and changing WorkflowRunConfig/graph fallbacks to .local/dataagent runtime paths with env overrides.
completed_tasks.verification: py_compile and targeted runtime-path pytest passed in the earlier session.

completed_tasks.name: Recorded Workflow Intent and Retrieval Spec V2 as the accepted target design.
completed_tasks.verification: git diff --check passed for the spec and STATE update.

remaining_tasks.name: Continue from the start of the workflow: decide and implement the Intent Analyst layer using the V2 spec.
remaining_tasks.description: Do not preserve old IntentFrame semantics as the target. The accepted direction is UserIntentArtifact as an LLM semantic compiler; compatibility adapters are temporary only.

remaining_tasks.name: After intent-analysis decision, design/implement RetrievalInput and SearchProbe generation.
remaining_tasks.description: RAG should receive structured probes generated from LLM-normalized intent, not only the raw user query and not json.dumps(intent).

remaining_tasks.name: Refactor Source Scouts to consume RetrievalInput, run multiple probes, merge/dedupe evidence, and preserve per-probe trace.
Remove domain-semantic string heuristics from HybridRetriever after the upstream probe contract exists.
remaining_tasks.description: Hardcoded economic synonym maps, phrase semantics, and query-intent parsers should not own statistical meaning.

remaining_tasks.name: Rerun relevant tests and inspect generated artifacts before committing code/spec changes.

blockers.description: Layer-by-layer design decisions are intentionally being made with the user before broad implementation.
blockers.workaround: Resume by discussing/implementing the Intent Analyst layer first.

blockers.description: Live workflow/golden acceptance still depends on local .env, live Qwen/Yandex credentials, and Qdrant/runtime data availability.
blockers.workaround: Unit tests can mock LLM calls; product runtime must not use fake offline intent/narrator fallbacks.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide the exact Intent Analyst implementation contract before code refactor continues.
human_actions_pending.context: User explicitly asked to decide workflow/retrieval fixes layer by layer, starting with intent_analysis.

decisions.decision: Intent analysis and retrieval will follow Option 2.
decisions.rationale: The workflow needs a structured UserIntentArtifact and RetrievalInput with multiple LLM-normalized SearchProbe items. Raw query-only retrieval is not acceptable.

decisions.decision: Domain semantics belong in live Qwen structured output, not in retriever string heuristics.
decisions.rationale: The project needs maximum relevant source recall across statistical catalogs; handcrafted token/synonym logic is too brittle and duplicates the LLM's job.

decisions.decision: Source preferences are explicit user constraints/hints, not guessed defaults.
decisions.rationale: No explicit source hint means scouts should search all trusted source families; explicit source mentions become soft or hard source scope depending on wording.

decisions.decision: Runtime manifests and workflow run outputs should not depend on .planning paths.
decisions.rationale: .planning is durable project memory/agent artifacts, not a runtime data dependency surface.

decisions.decision: graph_contract.py and orchestrator.py are legacy surfaces for the current Phase 2 runtime.
decisions.rationale: Current runtime uses service.py, graph.py, state.py, and workflow nodes. graph_contract.py is only directly exercised by tests/test_workflow_graph.py; orchestrator.py is still exported as run_query and used by older scripts/tests but is not the Phase 2 service path.

verification: Earlier targeted command passed: python3 -m py_compile app/workflow/runtime_paths.py app/workflow/service.py app/workflow/graph.py

next_action: Resume with the Intent Analyst layer. Read docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-18-workflow-intent-retrieval-v2.md, then decide whether to replace IntentFrame directly with UserIntentArtifact or add a temporary compatibility adapter. Do not start by refactoring HybridRetriever; upstream intent/probe contracts come first.
context_notes: The user wants decisions and implementation to proceed layer by layer. The immediate conceptual question was answered: RAG should receive RetrievalInput.probes, including the raw query as one probe plus stronger LLM-normalized probes. The new spec is the target; the current code remains partially old and partially patched.
